scripts.db:push:all: node scripts/setup-env.mjs && npm run db:push:identity && npm run db:push:clinical && npm run db:push:extended
scripts.db:push:identity: npm run db:generate -w identity-rbac-service && npm run db:push -w identity-rbac-service && npm run db:seed -w identity-rbac-service
scripts.db:push:clinical: npm run db:generate -w patient-service && npm run db:push -w patient-service && npm run db:generate -w appointment-service && npm run db:push -w appointment-service && npm run db:generate -w emr-service && npm run db:push -w emr-service && npm run db:generate -w clinical-service && npm run db:push -w clinical-service
scripts.db:push:extended: npm run db:generate -w lab-radiology-service && npm run db:push -w lab-radiology-service && npm run db:generate -w pharmacy-service && npm run db:push -w pharmacy-service && npm run db:generate -w billing-service && npm run db:push -w billing-service && npm run db:generate -w analytics-service && npm run db:push -w analytics-service
scripts.db:generate:clinical: npm run db:generate -w patient-service && npm run db:generate -w appointment-service && npm run db:generate -w emr-service && npm run db:generate -w clinical-service
